headline: 2 Profitable Stocks on Our Watchlist and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: Is Costco's 9.8% Comparable Sales Growth Stronger Than It Looks?

headline: Is Target Finally Winning Back Shoppers Across Key Categories?

headline: PMGC Holdings Signs Non-Binding Letter of Intent to Acquire Majority Stake in U.S.-Based Precision Machining Manufacturing Company Serving Aerospace, Space, Defense, and Semiconductor Markets

headline: Retail had a 'surprisingly robust' first quarter, but the real test is ahead as tax refunds dry up
summary: The retail industry saw strong first-quarter sales and profits, but high tax refunds and buy now, pay later helped mask underlying consumer weakness.
